# bugatti - ho voglia di capri

Bugatti's Spring/Summer 2026 collection embodies stylish lightness and Italian joie de vivre. Inspired by the relaxed atmosphere of Capri and the natural beauty of Italy, it combines timeless elegance with a feeling of summer serenity.
